compressed_context:
REFERENCE: RED-2009/28/EC [EU-2009]
SCOPE: TRANSPORT BIOFUELS ∧ BIO-LIQUIDS
CRITERIA: GHG-SAVING≥35% VS FOSSIL-FUELS
FUTURE: 2017:≥50% ∧ 2018:≥60%
OBLIGATION: MEMBER-STATES ENSURE COMPLIANCE
RISK: VIOLATION INTERNATIONAL-LAW IF NON-COMPLIANT
BIOENERGY: FOREST-CARBON-STOCK MAINTAINED WHEN LAND-USE-CONVERTED
ACCEPTABLE-SOURCES: AGRICULTURAL-RESIDUES ∨ FORESTRY-RESIDUES ∨ WASTE
STANDARD: PROCESS-STANDARDS ≠ FUNCTIONAL-STANDARDS ∧ HARD-TO-MONITOR
CAP: MEMBER-STATES MAY LIMIT FOOD-CROP BIOFUELS TO 7% ENERGY-SHARE
OBJECTIVE: PREVENT INDIRECT-LAND-USE-CHANGE-EMISSIONS
SUPPORT: NATIONAL-RENEWABLE-ENERGY-SCHEMES MUST MEET GHG-TARGETS
